svg.text: "Backend: Node.js WS Server + Electron Main Process"
"LiveCard: Streaming Card with Tool Timeline + StreamingSummary"
"DAGCanvas: 12 Node Types + 6 Edge Styles + Auto-layout + Virtualization"
"AgentGroupNode: Type Labels + Progress Bar + Child Tool Steps"
"PlanConfirmModal: Plan Review, Add/Remove Agents, Save Template"
"useSessionStore: Session CRUD + FIFO Eviction (>100) + Privacy Mode"
"ANSI Parser: stdout → JSON Events (14 ClaudeEvent Types)"
"Dual-mode Executor: Electron PM.spawn() | WebSocket Dev Mode"
"Claude Code CLI Process: stdio Pipe + switch_model"
"CEOAgent: Central Orchestrator — Hybrid Decomposition + Topology Execution"
"LLMDecomposer: LLM Online → Rule Engine (20+ Keywords) Fallback"
"stats DB: Token + Tool Calls, Filtered by workspacePath"
"localStorage: Privacy Mode Flag + Workspace Index State"
